inputs.label: Purchase Price
inputs.businessContext: Initial capital expenditure for acquiring the asset (ISO 15663 lifecycle costing).

businessContext_i18n.en: Initial capital expenditure for acquiring the asset (ISO 15663 lifecycle costing).

inputs.label: Annual Energy Cost
inputs.businessContext: Yearly electricity, fuel, or other energy consumption costs (Lean energy efficiency).

businessContext_i18n.en: Yearly electricity, fuel, or other energy consumption costs (Lean energy efficiency).

inputs.label: Annual Maintenance Cost
inputs.businessContext: Planned and unplanned maintenance expenses (Six Sigma reliability).

businessContext_i18n.en: Planned and unplanned maintenance expenses (Six Sigma reliability).

inputs.label: Annual Labor Cost
inputs.businessContext: Operator and technician wages directly attributable to the asset (WERC DC metrics).

businessContext_i18n.en: Operator and technician wages directly attributable to the asset (WERC DC metrics).

inputs.label: Annual Consumables Cost
inputs.businessContext: Filters, lubricants, spare parts, and other recurring supplies.

businessContext_i18n.en: Filters, lubricants, spare parts, and other recurring supplies.

inputs.label: Useful Life (Years)
inputs.businessContext: Expected operational lifespan per ISO 15663 or manufacturer specification.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected operational lifespan per ISO 15663 or manufacturer specification.

inputs.label: Salvage Value
inputs.businessContext: Residual value at end of useful life (accounting standard).

businessContext_i18n.en: Residual value at end of useful life (accounting standard).

inputs.label: Discount Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Weighted average cost of capital or hurdle rate for NPV calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Weighted average cost of capital or hurdle rate for NPV calculation.

inputs.label: Inflation Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual inflation for future cost escalation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected annual inflation for future cost escalation.

inputs.label: Utilization Hours per Year
inputs.businessContext: Actual operating hours per year (OEE availability).

businessContext_i18n.en: Actual operating hours per year (OEE availability).

inputs.label: Downtime Cost per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Lost revenue or penalty cost per hour of unplanned downtime.

businessContext_i18n.en: Lost revenue or penalty cost per hour of unplanned downtime.

inputs.label: Training Cost per Operator
inputs.businessContext: Initial and recurring training cost per operator (Lean skill matrix).

businessContext_i18n.en: Initial and recurring training cost per operator (Lean skill matrix).

inputs.label: Number of Operators
inputs.businessContext: Direct operators assigned to the asset.

businessContext_i18n.en: Direct operators assigned to the asset.

inputs.label: Asset Type
inputs.businessContext: Category influences depreciation method and maintenance factors.

businessContext_i18n.en: Category influences depreciation method and maintenance factors.

inputs.label: Depreciation Method
inputs.businessContext: Accounting method for annual depreciation expense.

businessContext_i18n.en: Accounting method for annual depreciation expense.

inputs.label: Include Downtime Costs
inputs.businessContext: Toggle to include or exclude downtime-related costs in TCO.

businessContext_i18n.en: Toggle to include or exclude downtime-related costs in TCO.

rules.message: Useful life must be greater than zero.
Discount rate must be between 0% and 30%.
Utilization hours cannot exceed 8760 hours per year.
Downtime hours cannot exceed utilization hours.
Salvage value cannot exceed purchase price.

thresholds.message: Total Cost of Ownership exceeds $500,000. Consider value engineering review.
Annual energy cost exceeds 20% of purchase price. Investigate energy efficiency improvements.
Downtime exceeds 10% of utilization hours. Consider preventive maintenance optimization.

formulas.label: Annual Depreciation
formulas.description: Calculates annual depreciation based on selected method.
formulas.formula: if depreciation_method == 'straight_line' then (purchase_price - salvage_value) / useful_life_years else if depreciation_method == 'declining_balance' then (purchase_price - salvage_value) * (2 / useful_life_years) else (purchase_price - salvage_value) * (2 * (useful_life_years - 0) / (useful_life_years * (useful_life_years + 1)))

formulas.label: Total Annual Operating Cost
formulas.description: Sum of all recurring annual costs, escalated for inflation.

formulas.label: Annual Downtime Cost
formulas.description: Cost of lost production due to downtime.
formulas.formula: if include_downtime then expected_downtime_hours_per_year * downtime_cost_per_hour else 0

formulas.label: Total Training Cost
formulas.description: One-time training cost for all operators.

formulas.label: NPV of Operating Costs
formulas.description: Net present value of all operating costs over useful life.

formulas.label: NPV of Depreciation Tax Shield
formulas.description: Tax benefit from depreciation (assumes 30% tax rate).

formulas.label: Total Cost of Ownership (TCO)
formulas.description: Comprehensive TCO including purchase, operating, downtime, training, minus salvage and tax shield.
formulas.formula: purchase_price + npv_operating_costs + total_training_cost - (salvage_value / (1 + discount_rate / 100) ^ useful_life_years) - npv_depreciation_tax_shield

primary.label: Total Cost of Ownership (TCO)
primary.description: The comprehensive lifecycle cost of the asset.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Energy Inefficiency
hiddenLossDrivers.description: If annual energy cost > 15% of purchase price, energy is a significant hidden cost driver.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Excessive Downtime
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Downtime cost > 10% of total operating cost indicates reliability issues.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: High Training Burden
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Training cost > 5% of purchase price suggests skill gap or high turnover.

suggestedActions.label: Implement Energy Efficiency Program
suggestedActions.description: Conduct energy audit and invest in high-efficiency motors, LED lighting, and VFDs.

suggestedActions.label: Adopt Predictive Maintenance
suggestedActions.description: Use vibration analysis and thermography to reduce unplanned downtime by 30%.

suggestedActions.label: Standardize Operator Training
suggestedActions.description: Develop Lean cross-training matrix to reduce training costs and improve flexibility.

suggestedActions.label: Review Depreciation Method
suggestedActions.description: Consider accelerated depreciation to improve tax shield if cash flow is a priority.

dataConfidenceAdjusted.label: Data Confidence Adjusted TCO
dataConfidenceAdjusted.description: TCO adjusted by a confidence factor (0.8 to 1.2) based on input data completeness and accuracy.
